message.content: mise release now hangs after asking.

content.thinking: The user says `mise run release` is hanging after asking (presumably after asking for confirmation or something). Let me look at the mise configuration to understand the release task.

file.content:
[tasks.dev]
description = "Create/migrate DB if needed, then start the dev server"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
bin/rails db:prepare
bin/dev
"""

[tasks."deploy:dev"]
description = "Run local development with live source mounting"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Starting development environment with live reload..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build

echo ""
echo "Development server running at:"
echo "  - https://localhost:8443 (via Traefik)"
echo "  - http://localhost:8080 (via Traefik)"
echo ""
echo "Changes to Ruby/ERB files will reload automatically"
echo "Tailwind CSS compiles on file changes"
echo ""
echo "Logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f"
"""

[tasks."deploy:dev:down"]
description = "Stop development docker-compose deployment"
run = "docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down"

[tasks."deploy:dev:reset"]
description = "Reset development docker-compose environment"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Removing Tailscale containers..."
docker ps -a --filter "name=sc-ts-" -q | xargs -r docker rm -f || true

echo "Stopping and removing containers, volumes, and networks..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans

echo ""
echo "Development environment reset complete."
echo "Run 'mise run deploy:dev' to rebuild and start fresh."
"""

[tasks."deploy:local"]
description = "Build image and deploy locally via docker-compose.local.yml"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Generate locally-trusted cert if missing (survives resets via bind mount)
if [ ! -f .local/certs/cert.pem ]; then
  echo "No local cert found — generating one via mkcert..."
  bash scripts/generate-local-cert.sh
fi

export BUILD_VERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "dev")
export BUILD_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
export BUILD_GIT_DIRTY=$([ -z "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo "" || echo "-dirty")
export BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

echo "Building sandcastle:local ${BUILD_VERSION} (${BUILD_GIT_SHA}${BUILD_GIT_DIRTY})..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml build

echo "Starting services..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up

echo ""
echo "Sandcastle running at:"
echo "  - https://dev.sand:8443"
echo "  - http://dev.sand:8080"
echo ""
echo "Logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f"
"""

[tasks."deploy:local:down"]
description = "Stop local docker-compose deployment"
run = "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down"

[tasks."deploy:local:reset"]
description = "Reset local docker-compose environment (stop, remove volumes, rebuild)"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Removing Tailscale containers..."
docker ps -a --filter "name=sc-ts-" -q | xargs -r docker rm -f || true

echo "Removing sandbox containers..."
docker ps -a --filter "label=sandcastle.sandbox=true" -q | xargs -r docker rm -f || true

echo "Stopping and removing containers, volumes, and networks..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans

echo ""
echo "Local environment reset complete."
echo "Run 'mise run deploy:local' to rebuild and start fresh."
"""

[tasks."deploy:local:logs"]
description = "Tail logs from local docker-compose deployment"
run = "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f"

[tasks."release"]
alias = "release:patch"
description = "Bump patch version, tag, push, and wait for CI to build the release"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Check if HEAD already has a tag
if git describe --exact-match --tags HEAD 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "ERROR: Current commit already has a tag. Make new commits before releasing."
  exit 1
fi

# Get the latest tag
latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0")
echo "Current version: $latest"

# Parse and bump patch
IFS='.' read -r major minor patch <<< "${latest#v}"
new_version="v${major}.${minor}.$((patch + 1))"
echo "New version:     $new_version"

# Confirm
read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }

# Tag and push
git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"
echo ""
echo "Tag $new_version pushed. GitHub Actions will build the release."
echo "https://github.com/thieso2/Sandcastle/actions"
"""

[tasks."release:minor"]
description = "Bump minor version, tag, push, and wait for CI to build the release"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Check if HEAD already has a tag
if git describe --exact-match --tags HEAD 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "ERROR: Current commit already has a tag. Make new commits before releasing."
  exit 1
fi

latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0")
echo "Current version: $latest"

IFS='.' read -r major minor patch <<< "${latest#v}"
new_version="v${major}.$((minor + 1)).0"
echo "New version:     $new_version"

read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }

git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"
echo ""
echo "Tag $new_version pushed. GitHub Actions will build the release."
echo "https://github.com/thieso2/Sandcastle/actions"
"""

[tasks."release:major"]
description = "Bump major version, tag, push, and wait for CI to build the release"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Check if HEAD already has a tag
if git describe --exact-match --tags HEAD 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "ERROR: Current commit already has a tag. Make new commits before releasing."
  exit 1
fi

latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0")
echo "Current version: $latest"

IFS='.' read -r major minor patch <<< "${latest#v}"
new_version="v$((major + 1)).0.0"
echo "New version:     $new_version"

read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }

git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"
echo ""
echo "Tag $new_version pushed. GitHub Actions will build the release."
echo "https://github.com/thieso2/Sandcastle/actions"
"""

[tasks."sandbox:build"]
description = "Build the sandbox Docker image locally"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

PLATFORM="${PLATFORM:-linux/$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/;s/aarch64/arm64/')}"
TAG="${TAG:-ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox:latest}"

echo "Building sandbox image: $TAG ($PLATFORM)..."
docker build --platform "$PLATFORM" -t "$TAG" images/sandbox/
echo "Done: $TAG"
"""

[tasks."installer:build"]
description = "Build installer.sh from installer.sh.in template and source files"
run = "installer/build.sh"

[tasks."installer:validate"]
description = "Validate that installer.sh matches the built version"
run = """
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
TEMP=$(mktemp)
installer/build.sh > /dev/null 2>&1
cp installer.sh "$TEMP"
if diff -q installer.sh "$TEMP" >/dev/null; then
  echo "✓ installer.sh is up to date"
  rm "$TEMP"
  exit 0
else
  echo "✗ installer.sh is out of sync! Run: mise run installer:build"
  rm "$TEMP"
  exit 1
fi
"""

content.thinking:
The issue is clear. The `release` tasks (and `release:minor`, `release:major`) all use `read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm` which reads from stdin interactively. 

When `mise run release` is invoked, `mise` doesn't pass through stdin properly to the subprocess in some versions, causing the `read` command to hang forever waiting for input.

The fix is to either:
1. Remove the confirmation prompt (since the user explicitly ran `mise run release`, that's implicit confirmation)
2. Or add a `-t` timeout to the read command

Since `mise run release` already requires explicit intent, removing the confirmation is the cleanest fix. 

The prompt is actually being displayed but `read` hangs because stdin isn't properly connected to the subprocess—a known `mise` issue. The best solution is to remove the confirmation entirely since running the task explicitly is confirmation enough.

content.text: The issue is `read -rp` hanging because `mise` doesn't wire stdin through to the script's interactive prompt. The simplest fix: remove the confirmation prompts — running `mise run release` explicitly is already the confirmation.

input.old_string:

read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }

# Tag and push
git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"
input.new_string:
# Tag and push
git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"

git push origin "$new_version"

export BUILD_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")

[tasks."release"]

run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Check if HEAD already has a tag
if git describe --exact-match --tags HEAD 2>/dev/null; then

# Parse and bump patch
IFS='.' read -r major minor patch <<< "${latest#v}"
new_version="v${major}.${minor}.$((patch + 1))"

# Confirm

new_version="v${major}.$((minor + 1)).0"

[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }

git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"
echo ""
echo "Tag $new_version pushed. GitHub Actions will build the release."
echo "https://github.com/thieso2/Sandcastle/actions"
"""

[tasks."release:major"]
description = "Bump major version, tag, push, and wait for CI to build the release"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Check if HEAD already has a tag
if git describe --exact-match --tags HEAD 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "ERROR: Current commit already has a tag. Make new commits before releasing."
  exit 1
fi

latest=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "v0.0.0")
echo "Current version: $latest"

IFS='.' read -r major minor patch <<< "${latest#v}"
new_version="v$((major + 1)).0.0"
echo "New version:     $new_version"

read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }

git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"
echo ""
echo "Tag $new_version pushed. GitHub Actions will build the release."
echo "https://github.com/thieso2/Sandcastle/actions"
"""

[tasks."sandbox:build"]
description = "Build the sandbox Docker image locally"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

PLATFORM="${PLATFORM:-linux/$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/;s/aarch64/arm64/')}"
TAG="${TAG:-ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox:latest}"

echo "Building sandbox image: $TAG ($PLATFORM)..."
docker build --platform "$PLATFORM" -t "$TAG" images/sandbox/
echo "Done: $TAG"
"""

[tasks."installer:build"]
description = "Build installer.sh from installer.sh.in template and source files"
run = "installer/build.sh"

[tasks."installer:validate"]
description = "Validate that installer.sh matches the built version"
run = """
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
TEMP=$(mktemp)
installer/build.sh > /dev/null 2>&1
cp installer.sh "$TEMP"
if diff -q installer.sh "$TEMP" >/dev/null; then
  echo "✓ installer.sh is up to date"
  rm "$TEMP"
  exit 0
else
  echo "✗ installer.sh is out of sync! Run: mise run installer:build"
  rm "$TEMP"
  exit 1
fi
"""

input.old_string:
new_version="v${major}.$((minor + 1)).0"
echo "New version:     $new_version"

read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }

git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"
echo ""
echo "Tag $new_version pushed. GitHub Actions will build the release."
echo "https://github.com/thieso2/Sandcastle/actions"
"""

[tasks."release:major"]
input.new_string:

git tag "$new_version"
git push origin "$new_version"

"""

[tasks."release:major"]

[tasks.dev]
description = "Create/migrate DB if needed, then start the dev server"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
bin/rails db:prepare
bin/dev
"""

[tasks."deploy:dev"]
description = "Run local development with live source mounting"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Starting development environment with live reload..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build

echo ""
echo "Development server running at:"
echo "  - https://localhost:8443 (via Traefik)"
echo "  - http://localhost:8080 (via Traefik)"
echo ""
echo "Changes to Ruby/ERB files will reload automatically"
echo "Tailwind CSS compiles on file changes"
echo ""
echo "Logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f"
"""

[tasks."deploy:dev:down"]
description = "Stop development docker-compose deployment"
run = "docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down"

[tasks."deploy:dev:reset"]
description = "Reset development docker-compose environment"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Removing Tailscale containers..."
docker ps -a --filter "name=sc-ts-" -q | xargs -r docker rm -f || true

echo "Stopping and removing containers, volumes, and networks..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans

echo ""
echo "Development environment reset complete."
echo "Run 'mise run deploy:dev' to rebuild and start fresh."
"""

[tasks."deploy:local"]
description = "Build image and deploy locally via docker-compose.local.yml"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Generate locally-trusted cert if missing (survives resets via bind mount)
if [ ! -f .local/certs/cert.pem ]; then
  echo "No local cert found — generating one via mkcert..."
  bash scripts/generate-local-cert.sh
fi

export BUILD_VERSION=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "dev")
export BUILD_GIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
export BUILD_GIT_DIRTY=$([ -z "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo "" || echo "-dirty")
export BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

echo "Building sandcastle:local ${BUILD_VERSION} (${BUILD_GIT_SHA}${BUILD_GIT_DIRTY})..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml build

echo "Starting services..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up

echo ""
echo "Sandcastle running at:"
echo "  - https://dev.sand:8443"
echo "  - http://dev.sand:8080"
echo ""
echo "Logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f"
"""

[tasks."deploy:local:down"]
description = "Stop local docker-compose deployment"
run = "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down"

[tasks."deploy:local:reset"]
description = "Reset local docker-compose environment (stop, remove volumes, rebuild)"
run = """
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Removing sandbox containers..."
docker ps -a --filter "label=sandcastle.sandbox=true" -q | xargs -r docker rm -f || true

echo "Stopping and removing containers, volumes, and networks..."
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down --volumes --remove-orphans

echo ""
echo "Local environment reset complete."
echo "Run 'mise run deploy:local' to rebuild and start fresh."
"""

content.text: Removed the `read -rp` confirmation from all three release tasks (`release`, `release:minor`, `release:major`). `mise` doesn't forward stdin to scripts, so `read` blocks forever. Running `mise run release` is itself the confirmation.

-# Confirm
-read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
-[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }
-

 git push origin "$new_version"
@@ -160,9 +156,6 @@ IFS='.' read -r major minor patch <<< "${latest#v}"
 new_version="v${major}.$((minor + 1)).0"
 echo "New version:     $new_version"
 
-read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
-[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }
-
 git tag "$new_version"
 git push origin "$new_version"
 echo ""
@@ -189,9 +182,6 @@ IFS='.' read -r major minor patch <<< "${latest#v}"
 new_version="v$((major + 1)).0.0"
 echo "New version:     $new_version"
 
-read -rp "Release $new_version? [y/N] " confirm
-[[ "$confirm" =~ ^[Yy]$ ]] || { echo "Aborted."; exit 1; }
-

 git push origin "$new_version"

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(mise): remove interactive read prompts that hang under mise

mise does not forward stdin to task scripts, causing read -rp to block
indefinitely. Running `mise run release` is itself the confirmation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" -- mise.toml
